shots.visual: 旅途出行：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: No hot water when you're out with baby?
shots.notes: Hook opening, airport or travel trip, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital °F display, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Mood: No hot water when you're out with baby?

shots.visual: 旅途出行：呈现痛点（传统暖奶器太大不便携）
shots.copy: Waiting forever for milk to warm is stressful on a trip.
shots.notes: Problem moment, airport or travel trip, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, frustrated with cold milk in baby bottle, bulky old bottle warmer in background, moody lighting, realistic hand physics, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, match approved person reference. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; never put bottle inside cup. Waiting forever for milk to warm is stressful on a trip.

shots.visual: 旅途出行：储奶袋/家用奶瓶经翻盖倒入杯内加热，倾斜经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒入干净奶瓶（便携可充电设计、外出随时加热；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热）
shots.copy: USB-C rechargeable — warm milk wherever you travel.
